title: Lace Loungewear Styling Board AI
sourceTitle: Lace Loungewear Styling Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Horizontal 4:3 Chinese lace loungewear styling proposal board for Mira Atelier Morning Satin Set. Subject: adult model standing near a bright window in a long robe layered over satin slip, elegant covered styling anchors the left hero panel, while the same loungewear design is broken down into fabric details, product structure, and styling notes. Scene: Warm white bedroom lookbook environment with soft natural light, premium bedding, product flat-lay details, material close-ups, right-side information modules, and bottom inspiration cards. Composition: Fixed 4:3 proposal-board layout: top bilingual title AI居家裙风格提案 / AI Lace Loungewear Styling Board, left hero model panel, middle product breakdown and fabric close-ups, right professional info module, bottom three outfit or scene inspiration cards. Signature Elements: Hero model display, dress breakdown, shoulder strap detail, neckline lace detail, waist cut, hem lace, enlarged fabric texture, gauze/satin/lace splice samples, hand touching lace edge, lifted hem drape close-up, swatches, rating bars, and three bottom Look cards. Style: High-resolution realistic photography board for premium homewear, loungewear, and light luxury womenswear, with Chinese social product-board clarity, fashion magazine polish, thin frames, swatches, material cards, arrows, rating bars, and handwritten Chinese annotations. Color Palette: Warm white, light grey-white, champagne white, cream, soft low-saturation accents, delicate fabric tones, and clean color swatches coordinated with the product. Lighting: Soft bedroom daylight, natural fabric highlights, clean material-detail lighting, gentle shadows, and premium catalog readability. Typography: Readable Chinese handwritten annotations and short label set Satin / Lace / Robe / Soft Fit; include small notes such as lace detail, soft color, lightweight fabric, natural drape, home atmosphere, and strong brand feeling. Restrictions: Keep all styling adult, tasteful, product-focused, fully covered, non-erotic, and high-end;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
